Author: iarcanar
Name: Magicite Babel Bridge
Punchline: Real-time Thai translation for FFXIV via Gemini AI
Description:
Hooks into FFXIV text system and translates dialogue, cutscenes, and battle text into Thai in real-time using Gemini AI. Features 290+ character database, context-aware translation, transparent overlay (TUI), and chat-style log (LOG). Requires the MBB companion app.

Commands:
/mbb — Open config panel
/mbb launch — Start MBB application
/mbb status — Show connection status
/mbb help — List commands

Tip: Add these commands to FFXIV Macro Editor for quick access from your hotbar.
